title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: KLAMATH-LAKE CARES CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site and off-site therapy/counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community training. 2421 Washburn Way Suite H Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 suspected to be victims of all types of abuse and domestic violence or neglect Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 274-6289 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 274-6289 Main phone Main phone (541) 274-6289 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of legal custody AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH-LAKE CARES
